geniee-cdp.title: GENIEE CDP
geniee-cdp.subtitle: AI-powered Customer Data Platform
geniee-cdp.description: Unified management of online/offline customer data with AI analytics powered by JAPAN AI. Standard integration with GENIEE MA / ENGAGE / ANALYTICS marketing cloud products.
geniee-cdp.overview: Responsible for frontend + BFF (tRPC) design and implementation. Built multi-cloud connection infrastructure, LLM integration features, and visual workflow editor.

achievements.title: Full-stack Architecture with Next.js + tRPC
achievements.description: Designed and implemented type-safe architecture integrating frontend and BFF. Achieved consistent type inference from API definition to frontend.
highlights: Server Components + Streaming SSR for fast initial load

achievements.title: Connection Management System (Multi-cloud Data Integration)
achievements.description: Designed and implemented unified management for AWS S3 / GCS / Azure Blob Storage connections.
highlights: Service-specific UI templates + tRPC router separation
Loosely coupled reference design from Workflow nodes

achievements.title: BigQuery SQL Editor & Data Preview
achievements.description: Built admin panel feature enabling non-engineers to view and analyze BigQuery data.

achievements.title: JAPAN AI Integration: Auto Metadata Generation
achievements.description: Implemented auto-generation of BigQuery table metadata (descriptions, column docs) using LLM API.
highlights: Few-shot prompts for improved output quality

achievements.title: Consecutive 2 Quarters OKR Rating A+
achievements.description: Achieved top rating for all quarters during tenure

learnings.title: Production-ready LLM Design
learnings.description: Implementation patterns for batch processing, timeout, and retry. State visualization and recovery design through status management.

geniee-chat.title: GENIEE CHAT ( Chamo )
geniee-chat.subtitle: Enterprise Chatbot SaaS
geniee-chat.description: Chat tool SaaS streamlining customer support and marketing activities on websites. Unified real-time support and automated responses. 4,500+ client implementations.
geniee-chat.overview: Led 5-person frontend team on architecture design and code review. Implemented new features end-to-end from DB design to API to frontend.

achievements.title: Full Legacy Frontend Replacement
achievements.description: Completely rebuilt 5+ year old Webpack + React Class Components with Vite + React Hooks (TypeScript). Dramatically improved developer experience and production performance.

achievements.title: Design System Construction
achievements.description: Designed and implemented product-specific Design Token system based on MUI v5. Improved UI consistency and maintainability.

achievements.title: Scenario Canvas (No-code Workflow Editor)
achievements.description: Designed and implemented visual editor using React Flow from scratch. Handled end-to-end from DB design to API to frontend. Reduced scenario setup time from 60-90min to 10-15min.
highlights: DFS algorithm for circular reference detection
JSON diff for version management & diff display

achievements.title: Static Resource Management System
achievements.description: Built feature to use user-uploaded static resources (images/videos/JS/CSS) in Chatbot. Handled end-to-end from DB design to API to frontend.

achievements.title: Consecutive 4 Quarters OKR Rating A+
achievements.description: Achieved top rating for all quarters during tenure

achievements.title: Zero Critical Incidents During Tenure
achievements.description: Prevented production incidents through quality management and code review

learnings.title: Free/Paid Feature Design
learnings.description: Design Feature Flags from early development and implement access control by plan tier. Building in control from the start costs less than adding restrictions later.

skyfall-skyflag.title: SKYFLAG
skyfall-skyflag.subtitle: Reward Ad Platform
skyfall-skyflag.description: Platform providing performance-based ads (offer wall) and incentive ads for mobile apps and websites. Implementations at major companies including LINE, DMM, MIXI, and NTT Docomo.
skyfall-skyflag.overview: Led frontend development and managed development team operations during EM absence. Handled tech selection and construction for new admin panel, development process setup.

achievements.title: New Unified Admin Panel Tech Selection & Design
achievements.description: Built new Admin Panel for multi-product management. Achieved rapid release timeline.
highlights: Auto-generated CRUD with Refine (React admin framework)

achievements.title: SKYFLAG Client Tech Updates
achievements.description: Executed major version updates for React / TypeScript and dependency vulnerability fixes.

achievements.title: Development Team Process Setup (Acting EM)
achievements.description: Managed development team operations during EM absence. Improved team productivity and quality.

achievements.title: Fastest 'Newcomer Motto Award' in Company History
achievements.description: Received company-wide recognition within 3 months of joining

learnings.title: Prioritization for Short-term Results
learnings.description: Prioritized high-impact initiatives and documented processes to prevent knowledge silos. Even in short tenures, leaving behind 'systems' creates lasting value.

fni-sunrisepark.title: SAGA Sunrise Park Reservation System
fni-sunrisepark.subtitle: Public Facility Reservation System
fni-sunrisepark.description: Online reservation and management system for SAGA Sunrise Park, a large-scale sports and cultural complex in Saga Prefecture. Grand opening May 2023, main venue for National Sports Festival (SAGA2024).
fni-sunrisepark.overview: Handled toC reservation site, toB admin panel, and Django backend. Also served as tech lead, code reviewer, and onboarding lead for external team (6 people).

achievements.title: Multi-team Codebase Integration & Refactoring
achievements.description: Maintained code quality and integration as multiple external teams rotated through.
highlights: Quality gate through all-PR code review

achievements.title: Migration to Gatsby + GraphQL
achievements.description: Drove migration from REST API-based architecture to Gatsby + GraphQL. Improved data fetching efficiency and developer experience.

achievements.title: External Team (6 people) Management & Onboarding
achievements.description: Tech lead for multinational external team, handling team building and technical mentoring.
highlights: Technical mentoring & knowledge sharing through code review

learnings.title: Documentation-driven
learnings.description: Always keep documentation up-to-date, assuming people will rotate.

learnings.title: Practical Tech Selection
learnings.description: Choose technologies the team can understand. GraphQL was sold on 'type safety reduces mistakes'.

learnings.title: Review as Quality Gate
learnings.description: When team members have varying skill levels, code review becomes the only reliable quality gate.

fni-ses.title: SES On-site Development
fni-ses.subtitle: Business System Frontend Development
fni-ses.description: Stationed at client site under SES contract, handling business system frontend development.
fni-ses.overview: Developed admin panels for business management system with React + TypeScript. Handled multiple modules including master data management, report generation, and workflow applications.

achievements.title: Business Management System Frontend
achievements.description: Developed multiple modules for internal business management system. Implemented master data management, data search, and report generation.

achievements.title: Workflow Application Feature
achievements.description: Implemented frontend for application and approval workflow. Handled form design to status management.
highlights: Dynamic form generation (field switching by application type)

learnings.title: Japanese Development Practices
learnings.description: First job in Japan. Practiced Ho-Ren-So, deadline management, and quality-focused development processes.

learnings.title: SES On-site Work Style
learnings.description: Adapted to client's rules and development flow while maintaining communication with home company.

youzan-saas.title: Youzan Weimall
youzan-saas.subtitle: E-commerce SaaS Platform
youzan-saas.description: E-commerce SaaS platform providing store building, shop decoration, and marketing tools for merchants. Listed on Hong Kong Stock Exchange in 2018, serving 100,000+ paying merchants.
youzan-saas.overview: Contributed to frontend development of shop decoration module and marketing campaign configuration tools in merchant admin as a team member. Also participated in internal business component library maintenance.

achievements.title: Shop Decoration Module Development
achievements.description: Contributed to frontend development of shop decoration feature in merchant admin. The feature supports drag-and-drop page editing with synchronized display on H5 and mini-programs.
highlights: Implemented property panels for decoration components
Fixed bugs in drag-and-drop sorting functionality
Wrote unit tests for decoration components

achievements.title: Marketing Campaign Configuration Tool
achievements.description: Participated in developing configuration interfaces for discount, flash sale, and coupon campaigns. Assisted in implementing form validation logic for campaign rules.
highlights: Implemented form interdependency for coupon configuration page
Contributed to campaign time conflict detection logic
Fixed edge case bugs in inventory validation

achievements.title: Internal Business Component Library Maintenance
achievements.description: Participated in maintaining company's internal Vue business component library. Fixed component bugs, improved documentation, and contributed business components.
highlights: Fixed edge cases in date picker, modal components

learnings.title: Configuration-driven Design for SaaS
learnings.description: SaaS must serve merchants of different scales simultaneously. Learned to drive UI through configuration rather than hardcoding business logic.

learnings.title: Enterprise Frontend Engineering
learnings.description: First exposure to complete frontend engineering: ESLint/Prettier coding standards, Git Flow branching, Code Review process, CI/CD automated deployment.

learnings.title: Component-oriented Thinking
learnings.description: Mindset shift from 'writing pages' to 'extracting components'. Understood best practices for Props design, state lifting, and component communication.

venomous-portfolio.title: Venomous Portfolio
venomous-portfolio.subtitle: Personal Portfolio Site
venomous-portfolio.description: Personal portfolio site built with Astro.
venomous-portfolio.overview: Portfolio is static content with minimal JS interaction, so chose Astro for zero JS by default. Built a custom cyberpunk design system.

achievements.title: Cyberpunk Design System
achievements.description: Designed and implemented a cohesive visual language from scratch.
highlights: Neon color scheme (cyan/magenta) with dark/light theme design
Perspective grid backgrounds + neon glow effects
Custom glitch page transitions with CSS Animation

achievements.title: Lightweight i18n
achievements.description: Static site with limited translations, so implemented lightweight solution without libraries.
highlights: Custom i18n implementation with JSON + TypeScript
Structured data managed in JSON (no Markdown needed)

venomous-ui.title: Venomous UI Library
venomous-ui.subtitle: UI Component Library
venomous-ui.description: Repeatedly encountered difficulties with theme customization and style overriding at work. Combined with personal styling preferences, decided to build a lightweight component library supporting both React and Vue from scratch.
venomous-ui.overview: API design inspired by MUI / Ant Design / Element Plus / styled-components, pursuing clean component interfaces and flexible styling capabilities. Components provide only essential styles and logic, allowing easy customization via CSS-in-JS or className.

achievements.title: Theme & Style System
highlights: Built-in Design Tokens with selective override
CSS Variable based, Dark Mode supported
Component style prop accepts CSS object or (theme) => ({...}) callback

achievements.title: Multi-framework & On-demand Loading
highlights: Subpath Exports separating React / Vue / Core modules
On-demand imports, only used frameworks and components are bundled

achievements.title: Accessibility (a11y)
achievements.description: Auto ARIA linking, focus trapping, keyboard navigation across all components.

learnings.title: SSR/RSC Integration Challenge
learnings.description: CSS Variable values are unknown at server render time. Requires Cookie or CSS dual-write strategies to prevent theme flash. Currently researching Next.js App Router compatibility.
